design_decisions.title: Goal: Use this exact conversation as the first-class test case for a canonical export pipeline that can prove better rec
design_decisions.summary: Goal: Use this exact conversation as the first-class test case for a canonical export pipeline that can prove better recall with structured data, source traversal, restart continuity, downstream consumer reuse, and pruning discipline.

design_decisions.title: - Every X must register a non-blocking follow-up bundle rather than forcing all downstream processes into the same creat
design_decisions.summary: - Every X must register a non-blocking follow-up bundle rather than forcing all downstream processes into the same creation step.

design_decisions.title: Every X must register a non-blocking follow-up bundle rather than forcing all downstream processes into the same creatio
design_decisions.summary: Every X must register a non-blocking follow-up bundle rather than forcing all downstream processes into the same creation step.

design_decisions.title: resolver contract: baseline proof must store the exact resolved artifact path/ID used for grounding before any compariso
design_decisions.summary: resolver contract: baseline proof must store the exact resolved artifact path/ID used for grounding before any comparison run is valid

design_decisions.title: evidence-bind requirement: baseline proof must resolve the search result to an exact session artifact/path/ID used for t
design_decisions.summary: evidence-bind requirement: baseline proof must resolve the search result to an exact session artifact/path/ID used for the grounded answer

design_decisions.title: canonical saved location when implemented: `obsidian/05-Captures/exports/baselines/<baseline-id>/baseline.md` plus machi
design_decisions.summary: canonical saved location when implemented: `obsidian/05-Captures/exports/baselines/<baseline-id>/baseline.md` plus machine-readable sidecar `baseline.json`

design_decisions.summary: Canonical expected answers:

design_decisions.summary: Canonical-answer bind rule:

design_decisions.title: before any scoring run, the baseline proof packet must bind both target answers to exact evidence excerpts and anchors f
design_decisions.summary: before any scoring run, the baseline proof packet must bind both target answers to exact evidence excerpts and anchors from the resolved frozen artifact

design_decisions.title: the scorer must compare baseline and structured runs against that evidence-bound canonical answer set, not the prose bul
design_decisions.summary: the scorer must compare baseline and structured runs against that evidence-bound canonical answer set, not the prose bullets alone

design_decisions.title: Comparison method: deterministic human-readable rubric against the canonical expected answers, with the structured expor
design_decisions.summary: Comparison method: deterministic human-readable rubric against the canonical expected answers, with the structured export surface named in the proof.

design_decisions.title: Canonical anchor schema:
design_decisions.summary: Canonical anchor schema:

design_decisions.title: Boundary rule for this brief: include a message only if it is at or before the frozen `end_message_anchor`; later messag
design_decisions.summary: Boundary rule for this brief: include a message only if it is at or before the frozen `end_message_anchor`; later messages in the same lane are excluded from the frozen seed and must become child exports if captured.

design_decisions.title: Seed export must receive an immutable export ID when implemented; that ID becomes the root trace node for this test case
design_decisions.summary: Seed export must receive an immutable export ID when implemented; that ID becomes the root trace node for this test case.

design_decisions.title: Any replay/evaluation run must name whether it uses the seed export, a child export, or a later revision.
design_decisions.summary: Any replay/evaluation run must name whether it uses the seed export, a child export, or a later revision.

design_decisions.title: `source_locator` is the canonical source-reference field.
design_decisions.summary: `source_locator` is the canonical source-reference field.

design_decisions.title: Root-resolution algorithm (must run before first export write):
design_decisions.summary: Root-resolution algorithm (must run before first export write):

design_decisions.title: if neither exists, set `session_id: null` and mark `session_id_status: missing`; capture must still proceed if `root_con
design_decisions.summary: if neither exists, set `session_id: null` and mark `session_id_status: missing`; capture must still proceed if `root_conversation_id` can be resolved

design_decisions.title: same conversation observed from multiple surfaces/views: one canonical `root_conversation_id` must win and all other obs
design_decisions.summary: same conversation observed from multiple surfaces/views: one canonical `root_conversation_id` must win and all other observed identifiers become aliases linked to that root

design_decisions.title: Deterministic fallback rule: identical source surface, source locator/permalink, and freeze anchor must resolve to the s
design_decisions.summary: Deterministic fallback rule: identical source surface, source locator/permalink, and freeze anchor must resolve to the same `root_conversation_id`.

design_decisions.title: Uniqueness rule: two exports may not claim the same `export_id`; if the seed is re-captured, it must resolve to the same
design_decisions.summary: Uniqueness rule: two exports may not claim the same `export_id`; if the seed is re-captured, it must resolve to the same root ID plus explicit revision lineage rather than a silent duplicate root.

design_decisions.title: [ ] If `session_search` does not resolve directly to a saved session artifact, create the canonical freeze-manifest/tran
design_decisions.summary: [ ] If `session_search` does not resolve directly to a saved session artifact, create the canonical freeze-manifest/transcript artifact first and bind its path/ID

design_decisions.title: [ ] Define the canonical export contract with three required outputs: export artifact, restart packet, and pointer trail
design_decisions.summary: [ ] Define the canonical export contract with three required outputs: export artifact, restart packet, and pointer trail

design_decisions.title: Any repo-root `captures/...` path is treated as legacy shorthand and must resolve to the authority root before proof or
design_decisions.summary: Any repo-root `captures/...` path is treated as legacy shorthand and must resolve to the authority root before proof or rebuild work is valid

design_decisions.title: Canonical file path: `obsidian/05-Captures/exports/baselines/<baseline-id>/baseline.md` plus machine-readable sidecar `b
design_decisions.summary: Canonical file path: `obsidian/05-Captures/exports/baselines/<baseline-id>/baseline.md` plus machine-readable sidecar `baseline.json`

design_decisions.title: Minimum rebuild fields inside canonical files: `baseline_id`, replay query, tool surface, run timestamp, returned sessio
design_decisions.summary: Minimum rebuild fields inside canonical files: `baseline_id`, replay query, tool surface, run timestamp, returned session identifiers/paths, exact summary/excerpt lines used for each answer, canonical expected answers, and final grounded answer text used for scoring

design_decisions.title: Canonical file path: `obsidian/05-Captures/exports/<date>/<export-id>/export.md` plus machine-readable sidecar `export.j
design_decisions.summary: Canonical file path: `obsidian/05-Captures/exports/<date>/<export-id>/export.md` plus machine-readable sidecar `export.json`

design_decisions.title: Truth precedence: canonical file pair first, index second
design_decisions.summary: Truth precedence: canonical file pair first, index second

design_decisions.title: Minimum rebuild fields inside canonical files: `root_conversation_id`, `root_resolution_version`, `export_id`, `session_
design_decisions.summary: Minimum rebuild fields inside canonical files: `root_conversation_id`, `root_resolution_version`, `export_id`, `session_id`, `session_id_status`, `source_surface`, `source_locator`, `source_path`, `created_at`, `captured_at`, `revision`, `parent_export_id`, tags, and lineage pointers

design_decisions.title: Canonical file path: `obsidian/05-Captures/exports/<date>/<export-id>/restart-packet.md`
design_decisions.summary: Canonical file path: `obsidian/05-Captures/exports/<date>/<export-id>/restart-packet.md`

design_decisions.title: Minimum rebuild fields inside canonical files: `export_id`, `root_conversation_id`, `captured_at`, restart summary, curr
design_decisions.summary: Minimum rebuild fields inside canonical files: `export_id`, `root_conversation_id`, `captured_at`, restart summary, current state, next step, and linked source export path

design_decisions.title: Canonical file path: `obsidian/05-Captures/exports/<date>/<export-id>/lineage.json`
design_decisions.summary: Canonical file path: `obsidian/05-Captures/exports/<date>/<export-id>/lineage.json`

design_decisions.title: Minimum rebuild fields inside canonical files: `export_id`, `root_conversation_id`, aliases, parent/child links, derived
design_decisions.summary: Minimum rebuild fields inside canonical files: `export_id`, `root_conversation_id`, aliases, parent/child links, derived artifact links, merge records, and tombstones

design_decisions.title: Canonical file path: `obsidian/05-Captures/review/<capture-id>.md` and `.json`
design_decisions.summary: Canonical file path: `obsidian/05-Captures/review/<capture-id>.md` and `.json`

design_decisions.title: Minimum rebuild fields inside canonical files: `capture_id`, linked `export_id` or source path, proposed destinations, e
design_decisions.summary: Minimum rebuild fields inside canonical files: `capture_id`, linked `export_id` or source path, proposed destinations, extraction buckets, and created timestamp

design_decisions.title: A lane that has not met its stopping condition but is externally interrupted must be classified as `interrupted`, not `f
design_decisions.summary: A lane that has not met its stopping condition but is externally interrupted must be classified as `interrupted`, not `failed`.

design_decisions.title: `interrupted` runs must emit a checkpoint artifact with: current stopping condition, last completed round, next required
design_decisions.summary: `interrupted` runs must emit a checkpoint artifact with: current stopping condition, last completed round, next required action, resume command/path, whether background continuation is allowed, and a snapshot of the exact grounding inputs needed to resume from the same truth surface.

design_decisions.title: Busy mode is a first-class runtime state for long-running review/extraction/orchestration lanes
design_decisions.summary: Busy mode is a first-class runtime state for long-running review/extraction/orchestration lanes. While busy, the lane must expose: active objective, current phase/round, stop condition, interruption policy, and latest checkpoint pointer.

design_decisions.title: If a lane is safe for unattended continuation, it should be eligible for explicit background execution with pinned workd
design_decisions.summary: If a lane is safe for unattended continuation, it should be eligible for explicit background execution with pinned workdir plus notify/checkpoint semantics rather than forcing an either/or choice against incoming work.

design_decisions.title: Background continuation must start from the snapshot/resume packet, not from chat memory
design_decisions.summary: Background continuation must start from the snapshot/resume packet, not from chat memory. Same starting point means same frozen inputs, same workdir/lane binding, same stop condition, and same proof pointer.

design_decisions.title: Parent reporting must distinguish: `completed`, `failed`, `interrupted`, `backgrounded`, and `superseded`.
design_decisions.summary: Parent reporting must distinguish: `completed`, `failed`, `interrupted`, `backgrounded`, and `superseded`.

design_decisions.title: If a second incoming task is higher priority, architecture should prefer dual-track handling when safe: checkpoint the a
design_decisions.summary: If a second incoming task is higher priority, architecture should prefer dual-track handling when safe: checkpoint the active lane, continue it in background if eligible, and service the new task without rewriting history as a simple fail.

design_decisions.title: Proof packets for evaluation lanes must record whether termination was endogenous (`completed`/`failed`) or exogenous (`
design_decisions.summary: Proof packets for evaluation lanes must record whether termination was endogenous (`completed`/`failed`) or exogenous (`interrupted`/`backgrounded`).

design_decisions.title: Adversarial review must operate on saved X artifacts and their follow-up outputs, not on live truth surfaces directly.
design_decisions.summary: Adversarial review must operate on saved X artifacts and their follow-up outputs, not on live truth surfaces directly.

design_decisions.title: Restart surface must restore context from the restart packet using the saved linked source export path and named next-st
design_decisions.summary: Restart surface must restore context from the restart packet using the saved linked source export path and named next-step state.

design_decisions.title: Lineage surface must traverse backward to the seed export and forward to at least one derived artifact from the lineage
design_decisions.summary: Lineage surface must traverse backward to the seed export and forward to at least one derived artifact from the lineage file without broad search.

design_decisions.title: At least one downstream consumer must ingest export metadata from the structured export/index surface directly and produ
design_decisions.summary: At least one downstream consumer must ingest export metadata from the structured export/index surface directly and produce a proof artifact.

design_decisions.title: Canonical first-consumer proof artifact path: `obsidian/05-Captures/review/<capture-id>.md` and `.json`, linked back to
design_decisions.summary: Canonical first-consumer proof artifact path: `obsidian/05-Captures/review/<capture-id>.md` and `.json`, linked back to the seed `export_id`.

design_decisions.title: If the audit shows `fam-hub capture extract` / `scripts/capture-insights.js` is stale or not live enough, a replacement
design_decisions.summary: If the audit shows `fam-hub capture extract` / `scripts/capture-insights.js` is stale or not live enough, a replacement first consumer must be named and bound before any pass/fail scoring run.

design_decisions.title: Final proof must name the replay steps or commands used for each consumer proof.
design_decisions.summary: Final proof must name the replay steps or commands used for each consumer proof.

design_decisions.title: From the canonical export directory alone, the system must be able to deterministically rebuild export, restart, and lin
design_decisions.summary: From the canonical export directory alone, the system must be able to deterministically rebuild export, restart, and lineage indexes.

design_decisions.title: Review packets are external derived artifacts: they must be linked by path and `export_id`, but they are not required in
design_decisions.summary: Review packets are external derived artifacts: they must be linked by path and `export_id`, but they are not required inputs to rebuild export/restart/lineage indexes.

design_decisions.title: Index rebuild proof must show that the rebuilt indexes preserve root IDs, export IDs, parent/child links, aliases, and l
design_decisions.summary: Index rebuild proof must show that the rebuilt indexes preserve root IDs, export IDs, parent/child links, aliases, and linked artifact pointers needed for recall and traversal.

design_decisions.title: indexes: append-only or explicitly rebuilt from canonical files; never prune in a way that breaks reconstruction
design_decisions.summary: indexes: append-only or explicitly rebuilt from canonical files; never prune in a way that breaks reconstruction

design_decisions.title: review packets: prune only after promotion/archival decision is recorded
design_decisions.summary: review packets: prune only after promotion/archival decision is recorded

design_decisions.title: Title: Conversation Export Traceable Intelligence Test Case Purpose: Turn this conversation lane into the proving ground
design_decisions.summary: Title: Conversation Export Traceable Intelligence Test Case Purpose: Turn this conversation lane into the proving ground for a structured export system that improves recall, queryability, traceability, and downstream reuse. Goal: Use this exact conversation as the first-class test case for a canonical export pipeline that can prove better recall with structured data, source traversal, restart continuity, downstream consumer reuse, and pruning discipline.

design_decisions.title: Identity Authority: 1
design_decisions.summary: Identity Authority: 1. if the source surface provides a native conversation ID, normalize and use it as the canonical root seed 2. else if a canonical artifact permalink/path exists, normalize and use it as the canonical root seed 3. else if the conversation is a live unsaved lane, create an immutable freeze-manifest/transcript artifact first and use its saved path as `source_locator` 4. else derive a deterministic fallback seed from normalized `source_surface + source_locator + start_message_anchor + end_message_anchor + freeze_timestamp` 5. emit exactly one `root_conversation_id` from the chosen seed plus `root_resolution_version` 6. record aliases for any non-winning identifiers, but do n

gaps.title: partial hit: one target recovered correctly while the other is missing or materially incomplete
gaps.summary: partial hit: one target recovered correctly while the other is missing or materially incomplete

gaps.title: `failed` is reserved for runs that reached a terminal negative outcome inside the lane logic: proof disproved, blocker u
gaps.summary: `failed` is reserved for runs that reached a terminal negative outcome inside the lane logic: proof disproved, blocker unhandled, max rounds exhausted, command error unrecovered, or explicit stop condition missed without continuity protection.

lessons.title: - X is allowed to exist as raw baseline capture before parsing, summarization, lesson extraction, restart packet generat
lessons.summary: - X is allowed to exist as raw baseline capture before parsing, summarization, lesson extraction, restart packet generation, promotion review, or pruning logic are complete.

lessons.title: X is allowed to exist as raw baseline capture before parsing, summarization, lesson extraction, restart packet generatio
lessons.summary: X is allowed to exist as raw baseline capture before parsing, summarization, lesson extraction, restart packet generation, promotion review, or pruning logic are complete.

lessons.title: Artifact X Follow-Up Bundle: 1
lessons.summary: Artifact X Follow-Up Bundle: 1. parse/export pass 2. restart packet pass 3. lesson extraction pass 4. promotion-review pass 5. prune/archive review pass

contradictions.summary: fail: either answer wrong, invented, or not source-grounded

contradictions.summary: [ ] Audit live checkpoint/export surfaces and separate working capability from stale or partial intent
